fields.summary: [UI2] YARN ui2 should use clusters/{cluster name} for all ATSv2 REST APIs

issuetype.description: An improvement or enhancement to an existing feature or task.
issuetype.name: Improvement

fields.description:
UI2 makes a REST call to TimelineReader without cluster name. It is advised to make a REST call with clusters/{cluster name} so that remote TimelineReader daemon could serve for different clusters.
*Example*:
*Current*: /ws/v2/timeline/flows/
*Change*: /ws/v2/timeline/*clusters/\{cluster name\}*/flows/


*yarn.resourcemanager.cluster-id *is configured with cluster. So, this config could be used to get cluster-id

cc:/ [~sunilg] [~akhilpb]

resolution.description: A fix for this issue is checked into the tree and tested.
resolution.name: Fixed

fields.summary: [UI2] log service redirect url need to support user name

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.
status.name: Resolved

issuetype.description: A problem which impairs or prevents the functions of the product.
issuetype.name: Bug

fields.summary: YARN UI2 should make use of "yarn.log.server.web-service.url" to fetch container logs

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.
status.name: Open

issuetype.description: An improvement or enhancement to an existing feature or task.
issuetype.name: Improvement

Skimming through patch, it looks reasonable. But I want once [~sunilg] to take a look at it once.

[~sunilg] [~rohithsharma] 
v2 patch incorporates cluster-id changes and ATSv2 log URL changes.
One thing I noted that {{yarn.log.server.web-service.url}} returns {{http://<ats-host>:<port>/ws/v1/applicationhistory}} for old clusters. But this might return {{http://<ats-host>:<port>/ws/v1/applicationlogs}} for new clusters which has ATSv2 log servlet changes. Please note the difference in namespaces between ATSv1.5 and ATSv2. Because of this namespace difference, I think dynamically fetching and setting the log-url in URL makes difficult.
Please share your thoughts.

Note: v2 patch does not yet support dynamic config of log URL. Please share your thoughts on the above issue and will update the new patch accordingly.

Thanks [~akhilpb]. Few comments:
 # yarn-ats-container-log to be renamed to yarn-log-service 
 # For  yarn-log-service , consider cluster_id as well in yarn-app-log so that it can send this in final url

Skimming through patch, it looks reasonable. But I want once [~sunilg] to take a look at it once.

[~sunilg] [~rohithsharma] 
v2 patch incorporates cluster-id changes and ATSv2 log URL changes.
One thing I noted that {{yarn.log.server.web-service.url}} returns {{http://<ats-host>:<port>/ws/v1/applicationhistory}} for old clusters. But this might return {{http://<ats-host>:<port>/ws/v1/applicationlogs}} for new clusters which has ATSv2 log servlet changes. Please note the difference in namespaces between ATSv1.5 and ATSv2. Because of this namespace difference, I think dynamically fetching and setting the log-url in URL makes difficult.
Please share your thoughts.

Note: v2 patch does not yet support dynamic config of log URL. Please share your thoughts on the above issue and will update the new patch accordingly.

 # For  yarn-log-service , consider cluster_id as well in yarn-app-log so that it can send this in final url
